---
title: "Notes"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## exponential survival time

i want to plot all of these overlayed 1) each simulation run 2) the pooled simulations 3) the theoretical survival curve given as S(t) = exp(-lambda * t * exp(beta * Z)).

stochastic process


##without gemini corrections

   lambda pct_cancer time_t          bias        rmse ecr
1    0.05    0.14855      1  0.0050548609 0.008162508 1.0
2    0.05    0.14855      2  0.0110256243 0.014401810 0.8
3    0.05    0.14855      3  0.0168744557 0.020229712 0.9
4    0.10    0.26600      1  0.0061502912 0.010949719 0.9
5    0.10    0.26600      2  0.0090559115 0.014280712 0.9
6    0.10    0.26600      3  0.0197137899 0.024640225 0.8
7    0.20    0.42695      1  0.0104998547 0.014881933 0.9
8    0.20    0.42695      2  0.0144501336 0.023334179 0.8
9    0.20    0.42695      3  0.0186285714 0.024174841 0.8
10   0.30    0.52240      1  0.0044701399 0.013919273 0.9
11   0.30    0.52240      2  0.0084691603 0.018448322 0.9
12   0.30    0.52240      3  0.0080167237 0.016574931 0.9
13   0.50    0.56035      1  0.0019899325 0.013852705 1.0
14   0.50    0.56035      2  0.0029817981 0.013196385 0.9
15   0.50    0.56035      3  0.0079232809 0.012026051 1.0
16   1.00    0.64305      1 -0.0001727626 0.012755965 1.0
17   1.00    0.64305      2  0.0030168528 0.011630912 1.0
18   1.00    0.64305      3 -0.0035291232 0.021745499 0.8
19   1.50    0.65260      1  0.0030094352 0.011266213 1.0
20   1.50    0.65260      2 -0.0066960273 0.023611541 0.8
21   1.50    0.65260      3  0.0321490313 0.039323331 0.2

## with gemini corrections
   lambda pct_cancer time_t          bias        rmse ecr
1    0.05    0.14895      1  4.973799e-03 0.008893286 0.9
2    0.05    0.14895      2  9.348958e-03 0.015414261 0.9
3    0.05    0.14895      3  1.834945e-02 0.024817681 0.9
4    0.10    0.27200      1  4.646951e-03 0.009303698 0.9
5    0.10    0.27200      2  5.774886e-03 0.012289933 0.9
6    0.10    0.27200      3  1.037723e-02 0.015897259 0.9
7    0.20    0.44270      1 -2.328863e-05 0.014870744 0.9
8    0.20    0.44270      2  4.326561e-03 0.016425537 0.9
9    0.20    0.44270      3  3.188737e-03 0.015609581 0.9
10   0.30    0.52155      1 -4.615241e-03 0.011212454 1.0
11   0.30    0.52155      2 -2.357256e-03 0.011312818 1.0
12   0.30    0.52155      3  6.701829e-03 0.011857940 1.0
13   0.50    0.55750      1  5.796482e-03 0.011156573 1.0
14   0.50    0.55750      2  8.104759e-03 0.017586465 0.9
15   0.50    0.55750      3  1.260784e-02 0.023778630 0.7
16   1.00    0.64155      1 -3.241437e-03 0.009521302 1.0
17   1.00    0.64155      2  3.438401e-03 0.013268201 1.0
18   1.00    0.64155      3  6.978062e-03 0.015970697 0.8
19   1.50    0.65715      1 -1.177927e-03 0.012143990 0.9
20   1.50    0.65715      2 -5.858700e-03 0.019670323 0.9
21   1.50    0.65715      3  3.299849e-02 0.037969572 0.0
